HGSS.714.0003:
My Pokémon are a cut apart from the
usual. Maybe even two cuts!
HGSS.714.0004:
Their cutting intensity and solid
attack... Top class, yeah?\f
HGSS.714.0006:
The prince among shorts-wearing
Youngsters, that is me!
HGSS.714.0007:
I hope I lived up to my title of the
prince among the shorts wearers.\f
HGSS.714.0008:
I can’t lose here! Not as the prince
among the wearers of shorts!\f
HGSS.714.0009:
I can’t bear this tension.
Would they be mad if I went home?
HGSS.714.0010:
I did it!
I won somehow!\f
HGSS.714.0011:
That’s gone past my limit!
I need to be excused!\f
HGSS.714.0012:
I’m not very good at this, but please
don’t hold back.
HGSS.714.0013:
Oh, didn’t I say?
You shouldn’t have held back.\f
HGSS.714.0014:
Fweh! I wish you would have held back a
little bit!\f
HGSS.714.0015:
In romance, fashion, and Pokémon!
Today’s girls want it all!
HGSS.714.0016:
The greed of today’s girls knows
no bounds!\f
HGSS.714.0017:
Did being greedy end up costing
me everything?\f
HGSS.714.0018:
I’m thinking hard about why everyone
likes battling so much.
HGSS.714.0019:
Why does winning a battle make
people happy?\f
HGSS.714.0020:
Why is losing a battle so
downright infuriating?\f
HGSS.714.0021:
I’m trying to keep up with my Pokémon
training and my own schooling.
HGSS.714.0022:
I’d like to think I’ve struck the right
balance of fun and education.\f
HGSS.714.0023:
This isn’t going to work?
My grades are the best in class, but...\f
HGSS.714.0024:
I crammed hard for this.
I can’t possibly fail!
HGSS.714.0025:
Yes! I get the win!
I’m glad I kept with this!\f
HGSS.714.0026:
It means I need to study at home
some more.\f
HGSS.714.0027:
My Pokémon are my treasures.
I’ll let you see them. Just you.
HGSS.714.0029:
See? They’re cute even when losing.
Eheheheh.\f
HGSS.714.0030:
I won’t lose ever!
Please abide by my rule!
HGSS.714.0031:
Thank you so much!
I owe this win to you!\f
HGSS.714.0032: I so did not want to lose...\f
HGSS.714.0033:
I can do this...
I can shine here, too!
HGSS.714.0034:
Yes! I won!
I’m going to be a star!\f
HGSS.714.0035:
One day, I’m going to shine as the
brightest star in the world!\f
HGSS.714.0036:
Don’t be shy.
You can bring it any which way.
HGSS.714.0037:
Yeah, I figured you’d be like this.
Heh.\f
HGSS.714.0038:
W-well, sometimes I have to lose, just
so I don’t crush everyone. Ahaha...\f
HGSS.714.0039:
My father’s wealthy.
There’s nothing he can’t afford.
HGSS.714.0040: My father’s money bought my Pokémon.\f
HGSS.714.0041:
There are things that money can’t buy.
I know that...\f
HGSS.714.0042:
Well, shall we?
Time is money, and the meter is running.
HGSS.714.0043:
Well, I’ll take my leave. Yet another
fancy dinner date, you know. Adieu!\f
HGSS.714.0044:
It’s my loss, is it? So be it.
I had to leave for a date anyway.\f
HGSS.714.0045:
Uphold the rules of etiquette and
courtesy... That’s what a lady does.
HGSS.714.0046:
If I couldn’t unwind this way, I would
lose my ladylike composure.\f
HGSS.714.0047:
I wish I could be free like the bird
Pokémon in the skies...\f
HGSS.714.0048:
If I were Honey, then you would be
Gooey Mulch, I would think.
HGSS.714.0049:
Do you see now?
How different we are in level and class?\f
HGSS.714.0050:
How dare you!
I won’t forget this humiliation ever!\f
HGSS.714.0051:
Partying, shopping, dining...
Darling, I’ve grown bored of it all.
HGSS.714.0052:
Excitement is so lacking in my life.
What will send my heart racing?\f
HGSS.714.0053:
Only battling lifts me from this idle
existence of boredom and apathy...\f
HGSS.714.0054:
I’m glad to make your acquaintance!
May this friendship be fruitful!
HGSS.714.0055:
Thank you very much!
Thank you so very much!\f
HGSS.714.0057:
The most natural Trainer is...
Oh, why hide it? None other than me!
HGSS.714.0058:
This is the natural outcome.
It was inevitable!\f
HGSS.714.0059:
I was battling naturally, and ended up
with the loss.\f
HGSS.714.0060:
Yes! Not a grown-up!
Lucky me! I stand a chance!
HGSS.714.0061:
Yup, battling another kid is a lot
less scary.\f
HGSS.714.0062:
I get really nervous in front of
grown-ups.\f
HGSS.714.0063:
It’s hard to keep the streak alive,
but the battles are fun.
HGSS.714.0064: It’s more fun to win, of course!\f
HGSS.714.0065:
Even losing is fun.
It’s the wonder of Pokémon!\f
HGSS.714.0066:
My daddy is a real mountain man. Does
that make my mom a mountain woman?
HGSS.714.0067:
Mountain woman sounds icky.
Not for me, thank you!\f
HGSS.714.0068:
I’m their daughter. Is being a mountain
woman my destiny?\f
HGSS.714.0069:
I have a packed lunch all ready, and of
course I have some snacks.
HGSS.714.0070:
My favorite Pokémon make winning
so easy!\f
HGSS.714.0071:
Oh, no, no! I forgot to bring my
favorite Pokémon!\f
HGSS.714.0072:
I frolic with my water Pokémon in a pool
all the time.
HGSS.714.0073:
It sure makes me happy winning with my
Pokémon favorites.\f
HGSS.714.0074:
I’d love to swim in a pool full of water
Pokémon.\f
HGSS.714.0075:
I promised Mommy I’ll practice swimming
if I lose.
HGSS.714.0076:
Yay! I won’t have to go to the pool
with Mommy today!\f
HGSS.714.0077:
Aww, I lost. Now I’ll have to go to
swimming practice today.\f
HGSS.714.0078:
I went and caught my Pokémon with
my daddy.
HGSS.714.0079:
I won, Daddy!
Daddy, thank you!\f
HGSS.714.0080:
I wonder if Daddy will show me how to
train my Pokémon next?\f
HGSS.714.0081:
I’m on the way home from the pool, but
OK, I can battle.
HGSS.714.0082:
I hope I can go home soon.
I need some dry clothes!\f
HGSS.714.0084:
I’m the captain of a heroic vessel
among the crashing waves of a storm!
HGSS.714.0085:
Made it to shore with the ease of a
real swashbuckler!\f
HGSS.714.0086: That was a bigger crash than I wanted!\f
HGSS.714.0087: I just now got back from my vacation.
HGSS.714.0088: The beach is a good place to show off.\f
HGSS.714.0090:
Hunh? A battle, is that it?
Sure thing, sure thing.
HGSS.714.0093:
This is going out to all the ladies.
Babes, I sing and battle for you!
HGSS.714.0094:
My ladies, my babes, I won for you.
Your love is my power, right?\f
HGSS.714.0095:
I lost, but my love for the babes can’t
be beat...maybe.\f
HGSS.714.0096:
This is no guitar I have here.
It’s traditional and Japanese.
HGSS.714.0097:
It has only three strings.
Can you tell what this is?\f
HGSS.714.0098: My instrument is called a shamisen.\f
HGSS.714.0099:
We teen Idols have a secret code
of conduct that’s strictly enforced.
HGSS.714.0100:
For example, if an Idol wins, she has
to squeal and jump around.\f
HGSS.714.0101:
If an Idol loses, she must never act
angry. That’s a big no-no.\f
HGSS.714.0102:
Do the monster Meteor Mash!
It’s my catchphrase!
HGSS.714.0103: My Meteor Mash goes to your heart!\f
HGSS.714.0104:
All Idols need a catchphrase,
especially right after their debut.\f
HGSS.714.0105:
You’re ever so lucky to get the chance
to battle with me.
HGSS.714.0106:
You’re super lucky to even battle
an Idol like me. Don’t you get it?\f
HGSS.714.0107:
Huh? Huh? Now, why did you win?
You know I’m supposed to win!\f
HGSS.714.0108:
Krink... Krak... Heheheh.
Let me limber up for this.
HGSS.714.0109:
Hah!
Weak, even for a joke!\f
HGSS.714.0110:
Gnnrrr...
I have only myself to blame...\f
HGSS.714.0111:
Aren’t they pretty? Adorable?
They’re my beloved Pokémon.
HGSS.714.0112:
You worked so hard! I’ll give you a nice
massage at home.\f
HGSS.714.0113:
What are you doing to my Pokémon?!
What if you hurt them?!\f
HGSS.714.0114:
I come before you as a member of the
Pokémon Fan Club! En garde!
HGSS.714.0115:
Long live the Pokémon Fan Club!
May it always be glorious!\f
HGSS.714.0116:
This is hardly a taste of what the
Pokémon Fan Club can bring down...\f
HGSS.714.0117:
Fan Club Department Manager...
I hereby accept your challenge.
HGSS.714.0118:
Heheh... Honestly, you thought you
stood a chance against the Fan Club?\f
HGSS.714.0119:
Gwah! I will be avenged...
B-by the Division Manager...\f
HGSS.714.0120:
Raising Pokémon with love isn’t the same
as coddling them. Don’t you see?
HGSS.714.0121:
Ooh, you did it! Oh, I love you so!
My luvly, wuvly Pokémon!\f
HGSS.714.0122:
How could you?!
What if my Pokémon are injured?!\f
HGSS.714.0123:
On behalf of my village, I take on
this challenge!
HGSS.714.0124:
Thank you, everyone!
Thank you for your vocal support!\f
HGSS.714.0125:
Fellow villagers, I’m sorry!
My best wasn’t enough!\f
HGSS.714.0126:
Thank you for your patience.
Here is the battle you’d ordered.
HGSS.714.0127:
I trust you were satisfied?
I feel shortchanged somewhat.\f
HGSS.714.0128:
I trust you were satisfied?
I’ve had my fill.\f
HGSS.714.0129:
Work is fun, and Pokémon also.
I am happy I come to this country.
HGSS.714.0130:
Having fun I am!
I hoping to live here forever.\f
HGSS.714.0131:
Oh, why you beat me? So mean!
I want go home to my country.\f
HGSS.714.0132:
I’m cool, right? So, everywhere I work,
they make me the maitre d’...
HGSS.714.0133:
I’m a good battler, too. I can’t help it
that the ladies fall for me.\f
HGSS.714.0134:
I dream of evolving from a maitre d’ to
a celebrity chef.\f
HGSS.714.0135:
There are no free deals on a battle.
You’ll get the full course, though.
HGSS.714.0136:
Where’s the fun if you don’t battle
like you mean it?\f
HGSS.714.0137:
I take work and play seriously.
That’s what sparks my passion!\f
HGSS.714.0138:
Hi, may I interest you in a meal combo?
...I’m so used to saying that at work!
HGSS.714.0139:
Thank you, and have a great day!
...What am I saying?\f
HGSS.714.0140:
We look forward to your next visit!
...What am I thinking?\f
HGSS.714.0141:
Your team looks impressive.
Will I be OK...?
HGSS.714.0142:
Oh, what?
Are those Pokémon only for Contests?\f
HGSS.714.0143:
Ouch! I said ouch!
It was too much! Way, way too much!\f
HGSS.714.0144:
I love bug Pokémon!
I love my bug net even more!
HGSS.714.0145:
I caught my Pokémon using my trusty
bug net.\f
HGSS.714.0146:
It’d be cool if there was a bug net
Pokémon.\f
HGSS.714.0147:
The bugs are my minions, and I’m the
boss. Are you prepared to lose?
HGSS.714.0149:
We were mowed down...
My minions have learned the hard way!\f
HGSS.714.0150:
I’m breaking out of my shell!
I’m taking it to the next level!
HGSS.714.0151:
It’s like I’ve sprouted wings!
Viva to the new me!\f
HGSS.714.0152:
Is it not my time yet?
Do I need to stay in my shell longer?\f
HGSS.714.0153:
You transgressor!
Hold still, I say!
HGSS.714.0155:
C-curses...
I’ve brought dishonor on us...\f
HGSS.714.0156:
Hey, hey, what’s that over there?
It’s... It’s a legendary Pokémon!
HGSS.714.0157:
Kekeke... Ninjutsu misdirection!
It worked to perfection!\f
HGSS.714.0158:
Ninjutsu misdirection was a failure!
I’ll disappear in a puff of smoke!\f
HGSS.714.0159:
You’ll be befuddled by my
dazzling speed!
HGSS.714.0160:
Your movements...
It’s as if you’re moving in molasses.\f
HGSS.714.0161:
I didn’t need to do all that dashing
around, did I?\f
HGSS.714.0162:
I’ve been wearing these clothes for a
long time. Bathing is for the birds!
HGSS.714.0163:
Changing clothes takes too much effort.
Taking a bath is even worse!\f
HGSS.714.0164:
No, no, no!
I won’t take a bath!\f
HGSS.714.0165:
I like my mommy, PIKACHU, and my daddy,
too.
HGSS.714.0166:
A weak Trainer isn’t cool.
I don’t like you.\f
HGSS.714.0167:
A not-wimpy Trainer is cool.
I like you.\f
HGSS.714.0171:
When I enter battle, I picture the vast
sea in my mind.
HGSS.714.0172:
When I can envision the sea, I feel as if
I could never lose.\f
HGSS.714.0173:
When I envision the sea, I don’t feel
the sting of defeat.\f
HGSS.714.0174:
In battle and in love, one needs to
know when it is best to back off.
HGSS.714.0175:
After all, both battle and romance can
become quagmires of despair.\f
HGSS.714.0176:
I may have lost, but I said something
deep, in an endless bog kind of way.\f
HGSS.714.0177:
I’m afraid I got cursed on our last
exploration of ancient ruins. Ehehe.
HGSS.714.0178:
Even just now, I have no idea how I won.
Heeheehee.\f
HGSS.714.0179:
I may be cursed, but this is fun.
It is all so very good. Heeheehee.\f
HGSS.714.0180:
Seeing buildings and towns from the old
ages sends my pulse racing.
HGSS.714.0181:
People interested in old architecture
are potential Ruin Maniacs.
HGSS.714.0182:
Open your eyes in towns. There will be
exciting new discoveries. I mean it.
HGSS.714.0183:
I put this team together with my
Internet buddies. It took us all day!
HGSS.714.0184:
We won! I need to thank my Internet
buddies for their advice!\f
HGSS.714.0185:
Aww, darn it! We lost?!
I’ll report it to my Internet buddies!\f
HGSS.714.0186:
I’m the main character of this story.
It’s impossible for me to lose.
HGSS.714.0187:
You’re good! Though, as a supporting
character, you’re a bit too strong.\f
HGSS.714.0188:
...The hero has to suffer a bit so the
audience feels more empathy.\f
HGSS.714.0189:
I’m very fickle. I can’t stick with any
one thing for very long.
HGSS.714.0190:
I won, and it’s enough for me.
I’m going to check out the Wi-Fi Plaza.\f
HGSS.714.0191:
I lost, so that’s enough. I’ll go to
the Safari Zone.\f
HGSS.714.0192:
I have a ton more experience than you.
What will you do about it?
HGSS.714.0193: Not bad, but you need more maturing.\f
HGSS.714.0194:
Experience alone doesn’t ensure any
wins, I’m learning.\f
HGSS.714.0195:
Don’t you think Pokémon battles are a
lot like the weather?
HGSS.714.0196:
Winning makes me feel warm and cheerful
like a sunny day.\f
HGSS.714.0197:
Losing makes me sad like a dreary,
cloudy day.\f
HGSS.714.0198:
I was out all night at a party again.
I’m feeling dizzy from playing games!
HGSS.714.0199:
I’m so bored of fancy parties and silly
games, too.\f
HGSS.714.0201:
Ooh, aren’t you the most darling thing!
Can you win a smile from me?
HGSS.714.0202:
Ooh, sweetie, I win, so no smile!
Be sure to win next time!\f
HGSS.714.0203:
I don’t feel like smiling now...but
I’ll be happy to wave good-bye!\f
HGSS.714.0204:
...Oh, wait one second.
I have to take this call.
HGSS.714.0205:
Hi, yup... Yeah, battling... Uh-huh...
Yup, I won... Well, duh... LOL...\f
HGSS.714.0206:
Hi, yup... Yes, just battled... Nope...
Kid beat me... Uh-huh...\f
HGSS.714.0207:
Snivel! Hnurrff! Snort!
This hay fever is a wicked misery...
HGSS.714.0208:
Hnurrff! Snivel! Snivel! Snivel!
I won, but the misery continues!\f
HGSS.714.0209:
Sniffle. Snivel. Snort.
I’m not crying. My nose is running.\f
HGSS.714.0210:
My acute sense of smell tells me how
tough a Trainer is.
HGSS.714.0211:
Keep trying. My nose tells me
you have great potential.\f
HGSS.714.0212:
Sniff, sniff... Snort! My nose tells me
you’ve been working hard!\f
HGSS.714.0213:
Kyahaha! I smell a powerful battle
in the making!
HGSS.714.0216:
I like hard, fast beats in my battling
and my rock ’n’ roll! Let’s wail!
HGSS.714.0217:
And, bam! That rhythm pattern ruled,
if I may say so myself!\f
HGSS.714.0218:
Ouch! That’s an insult to the ears!
Those beats were offensive, man!\f
HGSS.714.0219:
To show you how much this means to me,
I’ll use sound effects from now on.
HGSS.714.0220:
Raaaah! Dun dun! Dun dun!
Oompa-oompa-oompapa!\f
HGSS.714.0222:
Wait, please wait...
The winds... I hear them...
HGSS.714.0223:
I can hear them...
The winds are laughing...\f
HGSS.714.0224:
I can hear them...
The winds... They are in tears...\f
HGSS.714.0225:
I can’t fly...
But these babies can soar...
HGSS.714.0226:
My spirit has been uplifted to the
skies... Thank you, everyone...\f
HGSS.714.0227:
You broke my wings...
I won’t ever forget you...\f
HGSS.714.0228:
Every day, I’m like a migratory bird,
but I go in all cardinal directions.
HGSS.714.0229:
I gained experience while traveling to
all sorts of places.\f
HGSS.714.0230:
I’d love to live somewhere where I can
find other Trainers like you.\f
HGSS.714.0231:
I was born unto rolling waves that
washed me, with the beach, my cradle.
HGSS.714.0232:
I was born and grew up on the seas.
That’s what made me the big man I am.\f
HGSS.714.0233:
I lost, did I? Time to go to the sea
and stare inscrutably at it.
HGSS.714.0234:
Youths of today aim for the world!
How’s that for deep!
HGSS.714.0235:
There’d be some mighty cool Trainers
around the world. I’m sure of that.\f
HGSS.714.0236:
Go on, kid! Take on the world!
I’ll look forward to your return!\f
HGSS.714.0237:
What’s that? I smell dusty?
Don’t you know the aroma of soil?
HGSS.714.0238:
See, that’s what you get!
Your team had to eat dirt, get it?\f
HGSS.714.0239:
Dropped in the dirt by some kid who
doesn’t know the smell of soil!\f
HGSS.714.0240:
Sorry for looking so scruffy and dirty.
I’ve been holed up in the mountains.
HGSS.714.0241:
I wasn’t really holed up, at least not
on purpose. I was lost out there.\f
HGSS.714.0242:
It’s better to be holed up in the
mountains than in your room, I say.\f
HGSS.714.0243:
I’m not supposed to be here.
Can we do this on the sly?
HGSS.714.0244:
Even battling can draw attention.
It’s not easy being a pop star.\f
HGSS.714.0245:
Pop stars are ordinary girls at heart.
We want to enjoy our Pokémon, too!\f
HGSS.714.0246:
I’m a self-made celebrity.
Do you have a problem with that?
HGSS.714.0247:
A celebrity is a celebrity, even if it’s
in my own mind.\f
HGSS.714.0248:
I want to be the center of attention,
just me and only me.\f
HGSS.714.0249:
I’m facing retirement soon...
I was never admired as an Idol.
HGSS.714.0250:
I’m going to shine as a star battler
of Pokémon!\f
HGSS.714.0251:
I would have liked to end my career
with a win in this match...
HGSS.714.0252:
I think training Pokémon shares a lot of
similarities with a marathon. You agree?
HGSS.714.0253:
There’s meaning in sticking with your
training regimen every day.\f
HGSS.714.0254:
If you don’t pace yourself, you
can’t win.\f
HGSS.714.0255:
Howdy! Let’s keep it clean, fair,
refreshing, and pleasant!
HGSS.714.0256:
Whew, I feel invigorated!
Pokémon are the greatest!\f
HGSS.714.0257:
Uh, haha...ha... It actually feels kinda
cleansing to be thrashed this badly.\f
HGSS.714.0258:
It’s the Workers of the world like us
who keep the world going.
HGSS.714.0259:
There are times we would like to lay
down our tools and rest.\f
HGSS.714.0260:
Don’t forget how Workers like us work
for you.\f
HGSS.714.0261:
My wife and boy are waiting on me back
home. I can’t afford to lose!
HGSS.714.0262:
I’m sorry, but I had to do this. You’ll
get tougher with a family behind you.\f
HGSS.714.0263:
Oh, no! How am I supposed to show my
face around my dear wife and boy now?\f
HGSS.714.0264:
Pokémon are like family to me.
...Nah, they are family.
HGSS.714.0265:
Yes! My family, you did it!
We knocked off that mean Trainer!\f
HGSS.714.0266:
Fwaaaah! That’s cruel!
My family’s hurting!\f
HGSS.714.0267:
I was too lenient with my Pokémon.
They grew up all selfish on me.
HGSS.714.0268:
Hey, now, enough. Stop attacking!
The battle’s long over already.\f
HGSS.714.0269:
Hey, now, the battle’s over and done.
No attacking the Trainer.\f
HGSS.714.0270:
You, there. Don’t look around now.
Pay attention to me. Focus.
HGSS.714.0271:
Kid, you’re grossly underpowered.
You ought to train with me.\f
HGSS.714.0272:
Oh, yeah. You’re better than you look.
I was wrong about you, kid.\f
HGSS.714.0273:
Go, my Pokémon.
But don’t strain yourselves.
HGSS.714.0274:
Oh, wow, I like how tough everyone was.
Our Pokémon and you, yup.\f
HGSS.714.0275:
OK, nice try, gang.
Thanks much for trying.\f
HGSS.714.0276:
My papa’s dream...
I’m going to make it real.
HGSS.714.0277:
Papa, did you see?
We did it all for you...\f
HGSS.714.0278:
We lost...
Papa, I am so sorry...\f
HGSS.714.0279:
I’d like to take a break.
...No? We have to begin right away?
HGSS.714.0280:
Aww, see? You should have taken a
break with me before.\f
HGSS.714.0281:
Ooh, aren’t you a tough one?
You should take breaks, though.\f
HGSS.714.0282:
Yes, yes, looking good!
I need a smile now. Can you do that?
HGSS.714.0283:
No, no, no. I need a smile from you.
Let’s see those teeth sparkle!\f
HGSS.714.0284:
Yes, that’s a good smile!
Now tilt your head toward me.\f
HGSS.714.0285:
You probably can’t tell, but I can see
right down to your pores.
HGSS.714.0286:
Yes, I see it, indeed.
I can see you clearly.\f
HGSS.714.0287:
I zoomed in on you too much.
I couldn’t see your Pokémon.\f
HGSS.714.0288:
While battling, I’ll keep looking for the
best shot of you.
HGSS.714.0289:
There! And there again!
Decisive moments in time!\f
HGSS.714.0290:
Shots of me losing?
Those get deleted immediately.\f
HGSS.714.0291:
I’ll be bringing you live coverage from
my imminent battle!
HGSS.714.0292:
Our intrepid and beautiful Reporter has
carried the day! Go, me!\f
HGSS.714.0293:
Our intrepid and beautiful Reporter has
gone down in defeat. Take pity on me!\f
HGSS.714.0294:
I hate admitting it, but I wanted to be
an Idol, too.
HGSS.714.0295:
I didn’t want to lose to any Idol.
That motivated me to train.\f
HGSS.714.0296:
This is crushing... I work so much
harder than any silly Idol...\f
HGSS.714.0297:
This microphone is what made me a star.
It’s my all and everything.
HGSS.714.0298:
Even for a battle, I don’t let this
microphone leave my hand.\f
HGSS.714.0300:
Hey, ’sup. I should warn you, I’m right
fast, Trainer. Hold on to your hat.
HGSS.714.0301:
Trainer, from now on, you can start
adding Mister to my name.\f
HGSS.714.0302:
Trainer, that was a real learning
experience. Thank you, seriously.\f
HGSS.714.0303:
This Bike has become an extension of
my very being.
HGSS.714.0304:
Any damage to my Bike, I feel the pain
as if it were mine to bear.\f
HGSS.714.0305:
Please! I’ll ask you to keep your filthy
hands off my Bike.\f
HGSS.714.0306:
When I was little, I hated cycling.
I couldn’t get the hang of it.
HGSS.714.0307:
I love cycling now.
I’ve made many friends riding.\f
HGSS.714.0308:
Can you ride a Bike?
It’s healthy and a lot of fun.\f
HGSS.714.0309:
I’ll ride toward the breaking dawn with
you on my mind.
HGSS.714.0310:
I will shift my gears higher and higher
until I catch up to you...\f
HGSS.714.0311:
My tires have deflated, and
so has my heart...\f
HGSS.714.0312:
Let the curtains rise on the festivities
of muscles and Pokémon!
HGSS.714.0313:
Did you enjoy our demonstration of
muscles and Pokémon?\f
HGSS.714.0314:
Though I’ve lost, my muscles and
Pokémon are seared into your mind.\f
HGSS.714.0315:
They say I have fists of steel and the
heart of a child.
HGSS.714.0316:
Oh, yay! Yippee!
I won, I won!\f
HGSS.714.0317:
Oh, boo! Boo! This stinks!
I’m not talking to you!\f
HGSS.714.0321:
In my dictionary, there is no entry
for “restraint.”
HGSS.714.0322:
The greatest show of respect among
Trainers is to battle all out.\f
HGSS.714.0323:
I went all out and still lost.
Of course it stings.\f
HGSS.714.0324:
A professional martial artist is in
perpetual control of his body.
HGSS.714.0325:
A martial artist must be more than
strong. He must also be wise.\f
HGSS.714.0326:
Gah! I overdid my training and ran out
of stamina early...\f
HGSS.714.0327:
When I close my eyes, I can picture you
being defeated. Come on.
HGSS.714.0328:
Why be sad?
You knew this was coming.\f
HGSS.714.0329:
I berate myself for my own lack of
care...\f
HGSS.714.0330:
I don’t like to move much.
I trained using the Net and TV.
HGSS.714.0331:
Uhihi! I’m a naturally talented pro at
both karate and Pokémon, I am.\f
HGSS.714.0332:
Oh, man, this is rotten! I’m tired and
hungry and want to go home!\f
HGSS.714.0333:
...To get this far, I had to make
sacrifices. Many, many sacrifices.
HGSS.714.0334: It’s for this one moment that I live.\f
HGSS.714.0335:
What else do I have to give up so I can
beat you?\f
HGSS.714.0336:
First, let’s battle.
Talking can wait.
HGSS.714.0337:
That wasn’t bad at all, yup.
That goes for you and your Pokémon.\f
HGSS.714.0338:
You’re a tough one, yup.
Where do you do your training?\f
HGSS.714.0339:
Cute little Trainer!
We’ll squash you flat.
HGSS.714.0340:
Eheh! You’re so cute when you look
angry and frustrated!\f
HGSS.714.0341:
What do you think you’re doing?
I hate to lose, I’ll have you know!\f
HGSS.714.0342: My precious Pokémon will set you right!
HGSS.714.0343:
My Pokémon have no flaws that you
can exploit!\f
HGSS.714.0344:
I apologize, my dear Pokémon...
I was caught unprepared...\f
HGSS.714.0345:
Fwo-fwo-fwo. Youngster, what’s most
important is to never give up.
HGSS.714.0346:
If you give up, that’s it.
The game’s over.\f
HGSS.714.0347:
Fwo-fwo-fwo.
You’re an admirable Trainer already.\f
HGSS.714.0348:
I can tell by the way you look, you’re
quite taken with my dandy style!
HGSS.714.0349:
You shouldn’t be so mesmerized by me.
Like a MOTHIM drawn to a flame!\f
HGSS.714.0350:
Oh, you’re not interested in me?
You’re just SHELLOS, if I say so myself.\f
HGSS.714.0351:
Oh, hello, aren’t you a sweetie!
Are you sure you’re up to this?
HGSS.714.0352:
Oh, now, please don’t cry.
You should be proud of yourself, dear.\f
HGSS.714.0353:
Oh, my... You’re quite the capable
practitioner of the art.\f
HGSS.714.0354:
You and your Pokémon could use an
obedience lesson from me.
HGSS.714.0355:
This isn’t over until I say.
Once more.\f
HGSS.714.0356:
You defy me?
How very amusing.\f
HGSS.714.0357:
Over the years, I’ve crossed paths
with many a Trainer.
HGSS.714.0358:
They were all wonderful Trainers in
their own way. All fond memories now...\f
HGSS.714.0359:
You’re one among those many Trainers.
I’m sorry I wasn’t younger.\f
HGSS.714.0360:
I am a Psychic, though I may not look
like one. I’ll do something psychic.
HGSS.714.0361:
I didn’t use any psychic power to win.
No, really.\f
HGSS.714.0362:
Did you notice? I was levitating while I
was in battle with you.\f
HGSS.714.0363:
Fwazzam!
So! You are my next victim!
HGSS.714.0365:
Fwizzle...
Don’t think there will be a next time!
HGSS.714.0366:
I can use psychic power, but I prefer
ordinary sleight-of-hand magic tricks.
HGSS.714.0367:
It’s my opinion that psychic power
should be left to the Pokémon.\f
HGSS.714.0368:
I’m a Psychic, but I’m also a student
of a magician’s school.\f
HGSS.714.0369:
In the next few minutes, you will learn
true terror at my hands!
HGSS.714.0370:
Hah! Too weak! Too weak!
What pitiful resistance!\f
HGSS.714.0372:
I see what I have no right seeing...
Like there. Behind you.
HGSS.714.0373:
Oh? You can’t see it?
Then, you’re fortunate. Giggle...\f
HGSS.714.0374:
I wouldn’t ask about what I see.
It’s better not to know. Really.\f
HGSS.714.0375:
The great unseeable power...
I beseech you for help...
HGSS.714.0376:
Oh, great unseeable power...
I thank you for coming to my aid...\f
HGSS.714.0377:
Oh... Great unseeable power...
Why have you forsaken me...\f
HGSS.714.0378:
Why do I raise Pokémon?
Because they are there!
HGSS.714.0379:
I think I said something deep and cool!
Didn’t I?\f
HGSS.714.0380:
That’s no reason at all?
That’s the reason in itself!\f
HGSS.714.0381:
My team has been raised with care.
I have absolute confidence in them.
HGSS.714.0382:
You should pay closer attention to the
unique aspects of your Pokémon.\f
HGSS.714.0383:
How did you find my Pokémon?
Did you notice their significance?\f
HGSS.714.0384:
Everyone, it’s showtime!
Get out and do some clobbering!
HGSS.714.0386:
Arrgh! How humiliating!
Quick! Out of the spotlight!\f
HGSS.714.0387:
I love raising Pokémon.
It’s what I live for!
HGSS.714.0388:
Seeing them try so hard to please...
It’s so unbearably adorable.\f
HGSS.714.0389: Don’t you dare do that again!\f
HGSS.714.0390:
I’ve been devising ways of raising tough
Pokémon from the genetic level.
HGSS.714.0391:
You can’t overlook the role of
knowledge in raising tough Pokémon.\f
HGSS.714.0392:
I need to study and understand what
genetics is about first.\f
HGSS.714.0393:
Raise them with love, and Pokémon will
answer in kind. Probably.
HGSS.714.0394:
They responded to my love.
Probably.\f
HGSS.714.0395:
You’re raising your Pokémon with a lot
of love. I think.\f
HGSS.714.0396:
I believe I will approach this battle
from the perspective of a newborn.
HGSS.714.0399:
If you prevail, I’ll recount to you a
tale from my youth.
HGSS.714.0400:
Seeing you brings back a flood of
memories. Ah, yes, indeed...\f
HGSS.714.0402:
There’s no end to either adolescence
or Pokémon.
HGSS.714.0403:
See ya! That was fun!
Enjoy your youth!\f
HGSS.714.0404:
I’m still a dreamer.
A precious, unspoiled snowflake...\f
HGSS.714.0405:
Daddy... Mommy... Can you hear me?
Please watch over me...
HGSS.714.0406:
Daddy... Mommy... Did you see?
I won, and it’s all for you...\f
HGSS.714.0407:
Oh... Daddy... Mommy...
I couldn’t win...\f
HGSS.714.0408:
Finally... The time has come to put the
fruits of my research to the test...
HGSS.714.0409:
Success...
Sacrificing my youth was worthwhile.\f
HGSS.714.0410:
No! Nooooooo!
Give me back my youth!\f
HGSS.714.0411:
I developed a special Pokémon drink.
Have some! Bottoms up!
HGSS.714.0412:
Glug, glug... Belch!
It’ll make you strong! Don’t waste it!\f
HGSS.714.0413:
My Pokémon drink contains no actual
Pokémon or their byproducts.\f
HGSS.714.0414:
An analogy for battling is...
I’d say a bachelor guy.
HGSS.714.0415:
Heheh, do you get it?
I doubt you’d get it. No one does.\f
HGSS.714.0416:
Do you get what I’m saying?
I doubt you’d get it. No one ever does.\f
HGSS.714.0417:
Myself, I have been born, raised, and
spent my life under a circus tent.
HGSS.714.0418:
My Pokémon, too. They were born and
raised under a circus tent.\f
HGSS.714.0419:
The outside world is so very cruel...
We shall return to our circus tent.
HGSS.714.0420:
Oi, you! Yeah, you! Snap to it!
I’ll be training you!
HGSS.714.0421:
What?! You’re down and out already?!
This is no bed! Get up!\f
HGSS.714.0422:
Good! Enough!
That will do for today!\f
HGSS.714.0423: Fwah? You mean to challenge me?
HGSS.714.0424:
Fwahaha! I win!
Better luck next time, punk!\f
HGSS.714.0425:
Fwaah?! You defeated me?
Who are you to do that?!\f
HGSS.714.0426:
Ooh, it gives me shivers...
I live for this moment.
HGSS.714.0427:
Oh, yeah... That’s it...
Perfection doesn’t come better...\f
HGSS.714.0428:
It’s gotten so I can’t live without
battling anymore.\f
HGSS.714.0429:
OK! I’m going to do it!
I’m going to show you my best!
HGSS.714.0431:
Never again!
You can forget about a next time!\f
HGSS.714.0432:
Um... I’m honestly quite tough.
Please keep up.
HGSS.714.0433:
I’m sorry.
I don’t think you measure up after all.\f
HGSS.714.0434:
I’m amazed.
I didn’t think you’d win...\f
HGSS.714.0435:
Let’s go, me! Go, me, go!
Don’t lose, don’t lose, rah, rah, rah!
HGSS.714.0436:
Way to go, me! I’m so wonderful!
Rah, rah, rah! Gooooooo, me!\f
HGSS.714.0437:
It’s OK, me! Don’t cry! Don’t cry!
Go home, go home, goooooo!\f
HGSS.714.0438:
Woohoo! Here comes a cool Trainer!
Let’s see what you can bring!
HGSS.714.0439:
Yes! Bravo!
You have some good attacks, Trainer!\f
HGSS.714.0440:
Whaaaaat?! Nooooo!
I can’t get over how tough you are!\f
HGSS.714.0441:
To serve and protect Pokémon and
nature. That’s my mission!
HGSS.714.0442:
My skills I developed in the embrace of
Mother Nature!\f
HGSS.714.0443:
My mission needs me!
This is where we bid good-bye!\f
HGSS.714.0444:
Never fear, this Pokémon Ranger is
here to protect my own personal peace!
HGSS.714.0445: My personal peace has been protected!\f
HGSS.714.0446:
You vile Trainer, you!
You’ve shattered my peace!\f
HGSS.714.0447:
Any bad kids littering the fields?
Any bad kids fouling the sea?
HGSS.714.0448:
Be sure to sort your recyclables from
the trash when you’re throwing it out!
HGSS.714.0449:
Trash is like a battle.
Don’t be too quick to throw it!
HGSS.714.0450:
Watch me, darling!
I’m putting my best into this!
HGSS.714.0451:
See, darling? Did you see?
I put in my best effort for you.\f
HGSS.714.0452:
I can’t have my darling see me like this.
How pathetic I must look...\f
HGSS.714.0453:
So, I lead with this... Then, counter...
Ugh, I can’t get our strategy right!
HGSS.714.0454:
To overanalyze can be a bad thing,
I guess.\f
HGSS.714.0455:
Waaah! Couldn’t you have waited?
Until I’m ready at least?\f
HGSS.714.0456:
How do you like my cape?
I had it specially made!
HGSS.714.0457:
What is my cape made of?
I’m afraid I can’t tell you.\f
HGSS.714.0459:
Do you know what real terror is?
I am familiar with it. Intimately so...
HGSS.714.0460:
You learned something today, yes?
The true meaning of terror.\f
HGSS.714.0461:
Aiyeeh! What’s with you?
I’m pleading for mercy here!\f
HGSS.714.0462:
See it! Hear it! Smell it!
Marvel at my power!
HGSS.714.0463:
That’s right! Use all your senses and
realize what you were up against!\f
HGSS.714.0464:
I didn’t see anything! I’m not
listening! And I don’t smell a thing!\f
HGSS.714.0465:
Unluckily for you, your winning streak
ends with me.
HGSS.714.0466:
You lost to me, but you’re still on
your feet. Kudos to you!\f
HGSS.714.0467:
This can’t be. I won’t accept it.
There has to be a mistake somewhere.\f
HGSS.714.0468:
I c-c-can’t stop shivering.
B-but this is a b-battle. I have to.
HGSS.714.0469:
Urrff... Ch-chatter...
I won, I won...\f
HGSS.714.0470:
Sh-shiver... Urf...
My eyelids are getting droopy...\f
HGSS.714.0471:
I’ll say good-bye to you now.
Battles always end in tears.
HGSS.714.0472:
Fweeeeh!
My tears of joy flow freely!\f
HGSS.714.0473:
Fweeeeh!
My tears of anguish flow freely!\f
HGSS.714.0474:
How amusing! You came here knowing of
your certain defeat?
HGSS.714.0475:
Ahahahah! Very entertaining!
I shall be happy to see you again!\f
HGSS.714.0476:
Wh-what is happening...?
M-my vision is turning milky white...\f
HGSS.714.0477:
A Trainer am I, a new ray of hope from
the land of the midnight sun.
HGSS.714.0478:
In the frigid falls of the north, I honed
my skills. With them, I made you fall.\f
HGSS.714.0479:
Your foul trickery deserves contempt.
But effective it was, too.\f
HGSS.714.0480:
I’ve been pondering lately... How much
longer will I be wearing shorts?
HGSS.714.0481: Will I still be in shorts as a grown-up?\f
HGSS.714.0482:
If I grow old like this, will they call me
something silly like “Shorts Man”?\f
HGSS.714.0483:
That’s right, I’m the legendary kid in
shorts who’s the talk of the town.
HGSS.714.0484:
Even a Youngster in shorts like me can
be the stuff of a legend or two.\f
HGSS.714.0486:
Uh... Um... H-hello.
P-pleased to meet you.
HGSS.714.0488:
Uh... Th-thank you.
That was f-fun.\f
HGSS.714.0489:
Oh, this place is so passé now.
I’m missing out on shopping.
HGSS.714.0490:
You’re kind of stylish, actually.
Oh, I wish I had new clothes.\f
HGSS.714.0491:
Maybe I’ll collect Accessories for some
Contests...\f
HGSS.714.0492:
Exam season’s coming up, but I’m
neck-deep in battling...
HGSS.714.0493:
Mom’s going to cut me off.
I just know it...\f
HGSS.714.0494:
I have to keep up on both my studying
and Pokémon...\f
HGSS.714.0495:
Hiya, you Trainer there! Slip on some
glasses. They’ll make you look better.
HGSS.714.0496:
Nothing’s the matter with my eyes.
I wear glasses for the looks I get.\f
HGSS.714.0498:
I’ve been taught every opponent has
a weakness. If I can find yours...
HGSS.714.0499:
Eheheh.
I figured out your weakness.\f
HGSS.714.0500: Did you figure out my weakness?\f
HGSS.714.0501:
It’s been so long since I had my
last battle.
HGSS.714.0502: You know, battling is fun after all.\f
HGSS.714.0503: Battling is so much fun, but...\f
HGSS.714.0504:
The age of money has come to Pokémon
battling. I’ll teach you who is right.
HGSS.714.0505:
You understand, don’t you?
What is right, and who is stronger?\f
HGSS.714.0506:
M-my Pokémon! What have you done?
What am I to do?!\f
HGSS.714.0507:
You’re my opponent? Oh, all right...
Try not to disappoint me too badly.
HGSS.714.0508:
My Pokémon are all tops in luxury.
Do you see? This is what power is about.\f
HGSS.714.0509:
Nyah! I don’t care! I’ve got enough 
money to fill a swimming pool!\f
HGSS.714.0510:
You there. Yes, you.
I’m feeling rather bored.
HGSS.714.0511:
I suppose that was enjoyable for what
it was. I thank you for it.\f
HGSS.714.0512:
You are rather good.
Quite remarkable, even.\f
HGSS.714.0513: I can sink your sort with minimal effort.
HGSS.714.0514:
It took the barest of efforts to win
this match.\f
HGSS.714.0515: You swamped us with no effort at all...\f
HGSS.714.0516:
My room is always full of bugs.
That drives my mom just wild.
HGSS.714.0517:
I want to collect more bug Pokémon for
my bug appreciation station.\f
HGSS.714.0518:
Bugs are loose under my shirt.
I’m starting to itch...\f
HGSS.714.0519:
People claim I’m like an adult. Whatever
could they mean, do you suppose?
HGSS.714.0520:
Ah, yes, quite enjoyable!
We must do this again, surely.\f
HGSS.714.0521:
Oh, yes! Smashing!
That chilled me to my toes, it did!\f
HGSS.714.0522:
I have made my choice.
When I fall, it shall be forward!
HGSS.714.0525:
So, what exactly is a ninja,
you may ask.
HGSS.714.0526:
A ninja is powerful.
That will do as a start.\f
HGSS.714.0528:
I once saw a lady wearing the same
outfit as me.
HGSS.714.0529:
She said, “You’re showing serious
fashion chops.”\f
HGSS.714.0530:
She said, “You’re kidding me,
am I right?”\f
HGSS.714.0531:
Will you believe that inside this
costume is a grown-up Beauty?
HGSS.714.0532:
My dream is to live as a Pokémon
one day. To become a Pokémon!\f
HGSS.714.0533:
I’m an adult, but I want to be a
Pokémon. Does that make me weird?\f
HGSS.714.0534:
My profile’s riding high now, so my
schedule’s filled solid!
HGSS.714.0535:
Oh, no! It’s this late already?
I’d better check my timetable!\f
HGSS.714.0536:
Talent manager!
Do I have time for a rematch?\f
HGSS.714.0537:
Are you another of my fans? I can give
you an autograph if you’d lose?
HGSS.714.0538:
Here’s your autograph! Cherish it!
Oh, sorry! I don’t do handshakes.\f
HGSS.714.0539:
I’m sorry, I was acting GASTLY!
It was very DELCATTY of me!\f
HGSS.714.0540:
I need to diet.
I have to get out jogging.
HGSS.714.0541:
Well, I guess I’ll go for a quick trot
around here...\f
HGSS.714.0542:
Your Pokémon know how to punch hard.
You see, I’m really a boxer.\f
HGSS.714.0543:
I look to bug Pokémon for hints on
running all the time.
HGSS.714.0544:
I admire the light and agile footwork of
bug Pokémon.\f
HGSS.714.0546:
Listen, I’m feeling bushed today.
Can we do this tomorrow first thing?
HGSS.714.0547:
Oh, all right. You’re impatient.
Couldn’t wait till tomorrow, oh no.\f
HGSS.714.0548:
That’s why I said tomorrow.
I can barely stay awake now.\f
HGSS.714.0549:
Feed the Pokémon you catch, or they
will flee. Do you see?
HGSS.714.0550:
Once a Pokémon has fled, it will never
return. Do you see?\f
HGSS.714.0551:
What I said about Pokémon--it is a
parable. Do you see?\f
HGSS.714.0552:
When I was younger, I went out on digs
chasing rumors of hidden treasures.
HGSS.714.0553:
Of course, there are no such things.
But it’s about chasing a dream.\f
HGSS.714.0554:
Well, it sure left huge holes...
In the ground and in my bank account.\f
HGSS.714.0555:
I’ll launch an avalanche of moves!
I’ll test your limits of endurance!
HGSS.714.0556:
Well, Trainer?
Should I try out some more moves?\f
HGSS.714.0557:
That’s it! I’m all out of stock!
I’d like you to leave so I can close up!\f
HGSS.714.0558:
I collect and battle Pokémon so I can
brag to my peers.
HGSS.714.0559:
I’m not all that interested in winning
or losing to begin with.\f
HGSS.714.0560:
You’ve won the battle. But, in terms of
the Pokémon involved, I clearly win.
HGSS.714.0561:
Did you want to see my Pokémon?
OK, sure. Just a peek, though.
HGSS.714.0562:
How’s that for classy? My Pokémon are
tops in both moves and character.\f
HGSS.714.0563:
Hold it right there!
You can look, but don’t touch!\f
HGSS.714.0564:
Rock? Samba? Traditional folk?
I can play in any style. It’s all good!
HGSS.714.0565:
Music and Pokémon uplift me!
I’m carried up among the stars!\f
HGSS.714.0566:
Sigh... I’m seeing stars...
You’ve got me singing the blues...\f
HGSS.714.0567:
Let my exquisite melody ring out!
Hear my Pokémon shout out!
HGSS.714.0568:
The melody from my Pokémon and me...
Did it reach out and touch your heart?\f
HGSS.714.0569:
I’ve been known to throw matches, but
I’ll never throw a guitar on stage!\f
HGSS.714.0570:
I’m free like a bird!
I feel like I could fly!
HGSS.714.0571:
That’s how I ended up becoming a
Bird Keeper.\f
HGSS.714.0572:
Like most birds, I can’t see very well
at night.\f
HGSS.714.0573:
As a Trainer, I’m as fragile as an egg.
Please be gentle on me.
HGSS.714.0574:
Do you think I’m getting ready to
take flight?\f
HGSS.714.0575:
One of these days, I’ll break out of my
shell and defeat you.\f
HGSS.714.0576:
Bear witness to my display of machismo
and masculinity!
HGSS.714.0577:
There!
That’s how a real man lives and battles!\f
HGSS.714.0579:
I’ve got a showdown coming up with a
Hiker. Let me see if I’m ready!
HGSS.714.0580:
Yep, I’d say my team’s about ready.
That Hiker won’t know what hit him!\f
HGSS.714.0581:
Aww, blast it, no!
I can’t beat that Hiker like this!\f
HGSS.714.0582:
My showdown against a man of the sea
draws near! Let me test my team!
HGSS.714.0583:
Everything went as calculated...
Be ready for me, man of the sea!\f
HGSS.714.0584:
Beating the man of the sea is impossible
with an outcome this lame...\f
HGSS.714.0585:
Uhho uho-uho uhho hohoi!
This dance I use to psych myself up.
HGSS.714.0586:
Uhho uho-uho uhho hohoi!
So much fun, I cannot stop.\f
HGSS.714.0587:
Uhho uho-uho uhho hohoi!
I dance to stem my tears from losing...\f
HGSS.714.0588:
I’m not really with the police.
I’m a collector of uniforms.
HGSS.714.0589:
Battling as a Policeman made for a very
fun battle, it did.\f
HGSS.714.0590:
That’s it for me.
I bid you a fond farewell.\f
HGSS.714.0591:
I’m a Policeman. But on holidays, I’m
an entirely different kind of guy.
HGSS.714.0592:
Usually, I chase after bad guys as
a Policeman.\f
HGSS.714.0593:
On my days off, I chase after the waves
and the ladies as a Swimmer.\f
HGSS.714.0594:
Perseverance pays off.
A case can turn on that.
HGSS.714.0595:
It makes for more excitement when you
come from behind to take the win.\f
HGSS.714.0596:
That was more thrilling than any
stakeout! Thanks for that!\f
HGSS.714.0597:
My present case can go either way.
It’s a coin toss.
HGSS.714.0598:
So, I won this time...
All decided by a fickle coin...\f
HGSS.714.0600:
I live in the woods.
You know, I’m a Camper.
HGSS.714.0601:
I’m working on making camp life more
comfortable.\f
HGSS.714.0602:
I am sick and tired of camping out in
the woods...\f
HGSS.714.0603:
No, no, I can’t do this!
I’m not cut out for battling!
HGSS.714.0604:
Oh, wow! I won! What’ll I do?
You’re not mad at me, are you?\f
HGSS.714.0605:
See! I told you before we started!
Battling just isn’t for me.\f
HGSS.714.0606:
Trainer spotted!
It’s time to get cooking!
HGSS.714.0607:
A battle should be enjoyed like a
tasty meal!\f
HGSS.714.0609:
Fweeoo-fwee-fwee-fyoo...
I saunter into battle, whistling...
HGSS.714.0610:
Too easy! I was whistling all the way
through that.\f
HGSS.714.0611:
Fwee-ooo fwee-ooo fwee-ooo...
I switched to an ambulance siren...\f
HGSS.714.0612:
I can hear it... The screaming adulation
of 100,000 fans rising in unison...
HGSS.714.0613:
Right on, everyone! You saw that!
I dedicate my win to you!\f
HGSS.714.0614:
You’re scorching...
You’ve made a fan out of me.\f
HGSS.714.0615:
Number one worldwide, that’s my dream.
Well, to start, anyway.
HGSS.714.0616:
“Number one worldwide,” now doesn’t
that have a good ring to it?\f
HGSS.714.0617:
I can’t quite decide what I should be
number one worldwide at.\f
HGSS.714.0618:
I’m not some cheap Idol!
I’m an actress! Please remember that!
HGSS.714.0619:
My career isn’t anything like your
typical Idol’s career!\f
HGSS.714.0620:
I’m an actress...
It sounds so deliciously right...\f
HGSS.714.0621:
We’re not here for a long time, so let’s
make it a good time!
HGSS.714.0622:
Thank you! That was soooo fun!
I really hope we can battle again!\f
HGSS.714.0623:
It makes me sad having to say
good-bye... Please come see me again!\f
HGSS.714.0624:
I am the Fan Club Division Manager...
Bring your best to bear...
HGSS.714.0625: Kneel before the might of the Fan Club!\f
HGSS.714.0626:
Gweh! But I did my best!
Regrets, I have none!\f
HGSS.714.0627:
I welcome you, young Trainer.
Allow me to demonstrate my power.
HGSS.714.0628:
Young Trainer, do you have any idea
what my power signifies?\f
HGSS.714.0629:
You’ve surpassed me in your love of
Pokémon. You’re the truest of fans.\f
HGSS.714.0630:
I think I’ll try out the TM the woman
next door gave me.
HGSS.714.0631:
I am impressed. That woman actually
gave me something useful.\f
HGSS.714.0632:
Oh, that nasty woman!
This TM is worthless!\f
HGSS.714.0633:
I heard that! I may be old enough to be
your mom, but I’m still young!
HGSS.714.0634:
Look at my skin tone and my Pokémon!
Both firm but supple!\f
HGSS.714.0635:
Please don’t make that mistake again!
I’m young, I tell you!\f
HGSS.714.0636:
Whether it be work or play, I’m with my
Pokémon all day.
HGSS.714.0637:
Life without Pokémon?
I can’t picture that.\f
HGSS.714.0638:
It’s like I’m married to my Pokémon.
I’m not married, though.\f
HGSS.714.0639:
You get to be the best by working
harder than everyone else.
HGSS.714.0640: I reckon I’ve been a hard worker.\f
HGSS.714.0641:
Work at battling over and over.
Your star will shine one day.\f
HGSS.714.0642:
I’m going to become famous here so I
can rebuild the ranch.
HGSS.714.0643:
I can’t lose.
It’s for my pa and ma.\f
HGSS.714.0644:
If I can get famous, folks’ll pay to
visit my ranch...\f
HGSS.714.0645:
From sundown, I live by candlelight
until I go to sleep.
HGSS.714.0646:
That’s not to say I don’t have electric
power on the homestead.\f
HGSS.714.0648:
I’d like to introduce you to my
cherished partners.
HGSS.714.0649:
Good, good. Good going, gang.
You guys all did great.\f
HGSS.714.0651:
I’m no green thumb at growing Berries.
Raising Pokémon is where I shine.
HGSS.714.0652:
I can give you tips on raising Pokémon
so they’ll grow tough.\f
HGSS.714.0653:
Raising a living thing is never an
easy job...\f
HGSS.714.0654:
Pokémon are Pokémon, no matter how
tough, weak, cute, or scary.
HGSS.714.0655:
Raise Pokémon with love, and they’ll
return it.\f
HGSS.714.0656:
I think it’s the Trainer who needs to
pick up the pace here.\f
HGSS.714.0657:
Raising a Pokémon right takes money
and time.
HGSS.714.0658:
But it’s all worthwhile when the
Pokémon grows up.\f
HGSS.714.0659:
To raise the ideal Pokémon,
I’m willing to work hard.\f
HGSS.714.0660:
That’s right, I’m tough. I won’t lose.
I don’t think losing’s possible.
HGSS.714.0661:
Yup, I’m so tough...
Ehehe... Heeheehee...\f
HGSS.714.0662:
I lost? But, how...?
What now? What do I do?\f
HGSS.714.0663:
I’m an Ace Trainer, so this is for
bragging rights.
HGSS.714.0664:
Yup, you did good.
No, seriously.\f
HGSS.714.0665:
Heh...
I’ve got a long ways to go...\f
HGSS.714.0666:
I was looking forward to a battle
with you!
HGSS.714.0667:
I was right! You are pretty decent.
Why not become an Ace Trainer?\f
HGSS.714.0668:
You’re as good as the rumors say...
May I have a rematch one day?\f
HGSS.714.0669:
Look at me.
I’m what you should be aspiring to be.
HGSS.714.0671:
You’ve already surpassed me.
But you can aim so much higher.\f
HGSS.714.0672:
My whole life hinges on this one battle!
...Lose for me, pretty please?
HGSS.714.0673:
Yeah! I won!
It’s all smooth sailing for me now!\f
HGSS.714.0674:
I wasn’t supposed to lose...
That’s my life derailed...\f
HGSS.714.0675:
I’m running a fever here.
Just so’s you know.
HGSS.714.0676:
Oogh, my head’s burning up.
It makes me feel more inspired.\f
HGSS.714.0677:
Like I said, I have a cold.
I’m not on top of my game.\f
HGSS.714.0678:
When we battle, I want you to be very
careful. My coat’s very expensive.
HGSS.714.0679:
Yikes! Eek! Watch out! You almost got
Pokémon sweat on my coat!\f
HGSS.714.0680:
I was worried about getting my coat
dirty. Who cares about your battle?\f
HGSS.714.0681:
I wish you’d leave.
I don’t want to see you lose.
HGSS.714.0682:
I told you so...
Can you leave, please?\f
HGSS.714.0683:
Listen...is being tough not always a
good thing?\f
HGSS.714.0684:
Whoa-whoa-whoa... Careful now!
Maintaining balance is the key!
HGSS.714.0685:
Whoops...! Almost went over!
Have to be careful here...\f
HGSS.714.0687:
Now don’t you worry about a thing.
You leave everything to me, OK?
HGSS.714.0688:
What do you say? Fun, hey?
It’d be nice if we could meet again.\f
HGSS.714.0689:
Well, I’ll be!
You sure got the best of me!\f
HGSS.714.0690:
I will battle. It’s not likely I will lose.
I’m tough.
HGSS.714.0691:
I win.
I could do a dance right now.\f
HGSS.714.0692:
What is the matter?
Why couldn’t I win?\f
HGSS.714.0693:
Mother Nature, I beseech you!
Please, lend me strength!
HGSS.714.0694:
Oh, Mother Nature, I thank you!
To you, I dedicate this victory!\f
HGSS.714.0695:
I’m sorry, Mother Nature!
I’m sorry to disappoint you!\f
HGSS.714.0696:
A good Trainer takes on all challenges
regardless of the foe or the rules.
HGSS.714.0697:
No Trainer can be considered bad if
they battle the best they can.\f
HGSS.714.0698:
A good Trainer doesn’t gloat over a win.
They just prepare for the next battle.\f
HGSS.714.0699:
Come hither, my Pokémon!
Please get rid of this mean Trainer!
HGSS.714.0700:
Ooh, yes, I love you, my sweeties!\f
Come here and give me a kiss!
HGSS.714.0701:
How could you?!
You hurt my sweet little ones!\f
HGSS.714.0702:
I’m fine with practice and training, but
I wilt when the chips are down.
HGSS.714.0703:
I feel sick from tension!
I’d rather be at home practicing!\f
HGSS.714.0704:
If it’s about practice, I’d be the
champ without a doubt.\f
HGSS.714.0705:
Hi-yah! Hah! Hah!
One more! Hah! Hah!
HGSS.714.0710:
You beat me?
Where’s your dojo?\f
HGSS.714.0711:
Come oooon! C’mon, c’mon!
Hey! Hey! C’mon, hey!
HGSS.714.0714:
Your eyes are unclouded by doubt.
This match will be entertaining...
HGSS.714.0715:
From the bottom of my heart, I look
forward to your return.\f
HGSS.714.0716:
Whew... A most entertaining match.
I hope you’ll grant me a rematch.\f
HGSS.714.0717:
You need to be taught what wisdom of
age means in battle!
HGSS.714.0718:
I’ll have you know that no child can
hope to defeat me!\f
HGSS.714.0719:
That did not happen! Unfair!
I demand a rematch right now!\f
HGSS.714.0720:
I’m feeling cranky today!
Help me get my mind off it!
HGSS.714.0721:
Whew... A battle is the perfect
stress reliever!\f
HGSS.714.0722:
Eeeeeeeeh!
You’ve pushed me over to furious!\f
HGSS.714.0723:
Cue battle music, please!
I want to trumpet my victory!
HGSS.714.0724:
I love the battle music.
It sets my heart racing.\f
HGSS.714.0725:
Fine, that will do.
Back to the regular theme music.\f
HGSS.714.0726:
When you’ve been a Trainer as long as
I have, let’s just say you’ll see a lot.
HGSS.714.0727:
Things like this happen.
Don’t let it get you down.\f
HGSS.714.0728:
People and Pokémon are all different.
Isn’t that what makes it beautiful?
HGSS.714.0729:
My big brother told me to go for the
eyes! Aim for the eyes!
HGSS.714.0731:
My big brother told me to wreck the
other Trainer’s accuracy!\f
HGSS.714.0732:
I hear my Pokémon calling out...
They clamor to battle...
HGSS.714.0733:
I hear my Pokémon calling out...
They call for your return...\f
HGSS.714.0734:
I hear my Pokémon calling out...
They tell me of the fun they had...\f
HGSS.714.0735:
Behind you, I see light.
What is its significance?
HGSS.714.0736:
I thought I saw an aura of invincibility.
I must have been mistaken.\f
HGSS.714.0737:
Now I see...
You glow with the light of victory...\f
HGSS.714.0738:
I’ll deliver defeat to you elegantly
and speedily.
HGSS.714.0740:
I’m so terribly sorry.
I ended up with your intended defeat.\f
HGSS.714.0741:
Great, another tough-looking Trainer.
The fun never ends for me.
HGSS.714.0742:
Bleah, that was too close for comfort.
Nothing ever comes easy for me.\f
HGSS.714.0743:
Yeah, see? I knew I’d lose.
If only that move landed...\f
HGSS.714.0744:
Everyone has too much to say about
Pokémon! If it’s fun, that’s enough!
HGSS.714.0745:
Excuse me, but are you all right?
Maybe you’re a little too tired?\f
HGSS.714.0746:
If you get too caught up in winning and
losing, you’ll burn yourself out.\f
HGSS.714.0747:
Aren’t you the cutest guest! You can
expect the best service from me!
HGSS.714.0748:
Well, were you impressed by the level
of service I provided?\f
HGSS.714.0749:
Oh, wait, please!
I’m not done serving you!\f
HGSS.714.0750:
I keep a journal about the lives of the
Trainers who arrive here.
HGSS.714.0751:
In our vast world, I wonder how many
Trainers will cross my path?\f
HGSS.714.0752:
Every encounter ends in parting.
That’s why I keep a journal.\f
HGSS.714.0753:
I’ve waited all my life for someone like
you. I’m never letting you go.
HGSS.714.0754:
It was a ploy to confuse you with
words out of some romance movie.\f
HGSS.714.0755:
Now, go on, don’t let me hold you back.
Seize your chance at happiness!\f
HGSS.714.0756: Will you give me an interview if you win?
HGSS.714.0757:
You made my job too easy.
You need to buckle down.\f
HGSS.714.0758:
Your feelings now, in a word!
Shout it into the mike, please!\f
HGSS.714.0759:
I’m on a diet...
I’m so famished...
HGSS.714.0760:
I’m happy, but if I get excited, I’ll get
hungry. No thanks...\f
HGSS.714.0762:
Let me make it clear right now, I’m
tougher than you can stand!
HGSS.714.0765:
Clear the way! Out of the way!
Wait! Don’t go! We have to battle!
HGSS.714.0766:
Come on, take it up a gear!
Keep up with me!\f
HGSS.714.0767:
OK, out of the way! Clear the way!
Let this loser run away!\f
HGSS.714.0768:
Safe driving and safer battling.
That’s my motto.
HGSS.714.0769:
You can be patient in a battle.
Victory will come eventually.\f
HGSS.714.0770:
I’ll keep to my own pace.
I’ll catch up to you one day.\f
HGSS.714.0771:
I only have this Bike to look good for
the guys. I can’t actually ride.
HGSS.714.0772:
It was a pain getting this Bike here.
I had to push it all the way!\f
HGSS.714.0773:
I’m only concerned about looking good.
I don’t practice enough.\f
HGSS.714.0774:
I’m not looking for any excitement.
I don’t need any drama.
HGSS.714.0775: A battle is all the excitement I need.\f
HGSS.714.0776:
I recently realized that I’m not cut
out for this scary job.\f
HGSS.714.0777:
I’ll battle my way.
You battle yours.
HGSS.714.0778:
People are people.
I’ll go my own way.\f
HGSS.714.0779:
People are people.
You go your own way.\f
HGSS.714.0780:
Today, I have a special treat for all
my fans!
HGSS.714.0781:
Thank you!
I love your support!\f
HGSS.714.0782: Are you really one of my fans?\f
HGSS.714.0783:
I’m burnt out on being an Idol.
I want to go home to the country...
HGSS.714.0784:
I can’t quit now!
Kids dream of being me!\f
HGSS.714.0785: I miss hearing my mother’s voice...\f
HGSS.714.0786:
I’m one of a kind.
That’s what I’m saying.
HGSS.714.0787:
I keep it real.
That’s what makes me tough.\f
HGSS.714.0788:
I kept it real, but you won anyway.
Your reality was more real.\f
HGSS.714.0789:
Hi! Are you my next opponent?
Let’s keep it clean and fair!
HGSS.714.0790:
It feels great going all out with no
dirty tricks.\f
HGSS.714.0791:
That was an awesome workout!
We have to do this again sometime!\f
HGSS.714.0792:
My needs are simple.
Fishing and Moomoo Milk are all I need.
HGSS.714.0793:
Winning or losing isn’t something I pay
heed to.\f
HGSS.714.0794:
I could use some Moomoo Milk right
about now.\f
HGSS.714.0795:
You there! Take a look at the Pokémon
I fished up the other day.
HGSS.714.0796:
I can tell you’re impressed. This guy,
I don’t know how long it took to land.\f
HGSS.714.0797:
A word of advice: when an older person
is bragging, pretend to be interested.\f
HGSS.714.0798:
You’re a Trainer.
Let your Pokémon do the talking.
HGSS.714.0799:
Where’s your spirit?
That didn’t speak to me at all.\f
HGSS.714.0800:
Great! Great!
Your feelings came across!\f
HGSS.714.0801:
Here comes your prey!
Get ’em! Chaaaarge!
HGSS.714.0803:
We’re outmatched!
Pull back, guys! Run away!\f
HGSS.714.0807:
I am captivated by the mountains.
They’re the main thing in my life!
HGSS.714.0808:
The mountains mean more to me
than any battle, no matter how fun!\f
HGSS.714.0809:
Your battle skills are impressive, but I
can’t wait to return to the mountains.\f
HGSS.714.0810:
We’re going to hammer you, kid.
Don’t freeze up and close your eyes.
HGSS.714.0811:
I like how you stay defiant even after
losing. Good attitude, kid.\f
HGSS.714.0812:
Honest, I didn’t let up one bit or let
down my guard because you’re a kid.\f
HGSS.714.0813:
I battle around the globe.
I’m a worldwide bad boy!
HGSS.714.0814:
I don’t lose at battling.
I can’t get over how cool I am!\f
HGSS.714.0815:
I’m hitting the road over that loss.
It’s good-bye to the old me!\f
HGSS.714.0816:
Battles, I’m good at.
But musical aptitude? Forget it.
HGSS.714.0817:
This whole battling thing is good, but
I wish I could play music as well.\f
HGSS.714.0818:
Music or Pokémon...
It’s a tough choice.\f
HGSS.714.0819:
I wrote a song using the cries of
Pokémon. I’d like you to hear it.
HGSS.714.0820:
Graaah wagyaaah! Wagyaaaah!
Chu! Chu! Gyaroooh-gah!\f
HGSS.714.0822:
I’m bored of collecting and hoarding.
I’m getting rid of everything now.
HGSS.714.0823:
There’s nothing that I really want now.
Maybe I’ll become a clown...
HGSS.714.0824:
I threw the match for a start.
It’s nice to be unburdened of things.
HGSS.714.0825:
Oh! Hold on a second!
Incoming text message!
HGSS.714.0826:
Ticka-ticka-ticka... Ticka-tick...
Huh? Is it over already?\f
HGSS.714.0827:
Hey, stop that!
No peeking at my text messages!\f
HGSS.714.0828:
There’s no meaning to this battle!
Pokémon should be about love!
HGSS.714.0829:
Battling leaves me empty.
Hug your Pokémon and show your love!\f
HGSS.714.0830:
Battling creates nothing.
Hug your Pokémon and show your love!\f
HGSS.714.0831:
Are you challenging me? ...You are.
Kids these days...
HGSS.714.0832:
Now run along home, and go help your
mommy with her chores!\f
HGSS.714.0833:
Hey, you... If you think playtime will
last forever, you’ll end up like me.\f
HGSS.714.0834: How will you counter my implacable logic?
HGSS.714.0835:
Everything according to calculation...
This victory is a complete one.\f
HGSS.714.0837:
I’ve been ensconced in the lab.
My shoulders are all knotted up.
HGSS.714.0838:
What a refreshing break!
I’m feeling loose and relaxed now.\f
HGSS.714.0839:
My Pokémon and I, we all need to get
outside and exercise more.\f
HGSS.714.0840:
Hmmm... So young...
I may have to go easy...
HGSS.714.0841:
You’re so depressingly young...
It’s fine. You may go.\f
HGSS.714.0842:
Consider the loser’s feelings.
That’s where you young people fail...\f
HGSS.714.0843:
You see an old man, yes?
Don’t be fooled by the way I look.
HGSS.714.0844:
I find it abhorrent to lose to any
young Trainer.\f
HGSS.714.0845:
I was fooled by your youth.
Foolish, foolish me...\f
HGSS.714.0846:
As a Worker, it’s my job to both build
and demolish.
HGSS.714.0847:
Why don’t you become a Worker, too?
I find it fun and rewarding.\f
HGSS.714.0848:
Making things is harder than
demolishing, but it’s more satisfying.\f
HGSS.714.0849:
You and your Pokémon, I’ll clean up on
you easily.
HGSS.714.0850:
Well, well, how pathetic was that.
Take your passengers and go home.\f
HGSS.714.0851:
Gwaah... So heavy...
My guys buckled under the load.\f
HGSS.714.0852:
Outstanding athleticism and a great
sense of humor; that’s a clown!
HGSS.714.0853:
A clown is a job of greatness.
Only the chosen can become one!\f
HGSS.714.0854:
The ability to laugh off disappointment
is another requirement for a clown!\f
HGSS.714.0855:
Laugh with the face and cry with the
heart; that’s how a clown lives.
HGSS.714.0858:
Oi, listen! I’m a Policeman, sure, but a
Trainer before that!
HGSS.714.0859:
What?
A Policeman can’t lose his temper?\f
HGSS.714.0860:
Yes, I’m a Policeman, but I have dreams
and aspirations, and, and... Snivel...\f
HGSS.714.0861:
Hands up! Put ’em where I can see ’em!
You’re all under arrest!
HGSS.714.0863: This is a gross miscarriage of justice!\f
HGSS.714.0864:
I’ll have you know that I’m an
Internet detective.
HGSS.714.0865:
My powers of observation and
logic prevailed!\f
HGSS.714.0866:
